title: audit — trait composition
description: Owns `HasAudit` — opt-in trait models declare to publish to the audit trail. Wraps owen-it's `Auditable` interface + trait bundle.

owned.description: Opt-in trait for compliance-grade auditing. Wraps owen-it's `Auditable` interface + trait. Layers our defaults: workspace_id from WorkspacesResolver, ULID prefix `aud_`, restricted-tier field values automatically KMS-encrypted via `auditEncrypted` array, tamper-evident row_hash computed on write (when enabled).
usedBy: any module opting a model into audit
notes: Composes owen-it's `Auditable` — do NOT also implement `Auditable` interface directly.
Model author defines `$auditEncrypted` array to opt fields into KMS encryption before persist.
Model author defines `$auditExclude` array to skip fields entirely.
Foundation's `HasAuditable` trait is now a thin re-export of this trait for backwards compatibility.

usedBy: HasAudit implements this via trait composition

workspaces.reason: System-level audits carry workspace_id=NULL (deploys, cron jobs)

audit.notes: Our Audit model overrides owen-it's + adds ULIDs, workspace scope, KMS casts, optional chain columns.
